# Mountain View Commons

> Mountain View Commons (MVC) is a 43-unit mixed-use flex space development in Heber City, Utah. Each unit is approximately 5,000 square feet across three floors with a 30' x 60' footprint per floor, drive-through 16-foot garage doors front and rear, and zoning that permits residential, commercial, and warehouse use under one roof. Located on U.S. Highway 40 less than two miles from the Heber Valley Airport (HCR), 15 minutes from Deer Valley East Village, and 25 minutes from Park City Mountain Resort.

## Key Facts

- **Total units:** 43 across 7 buildings, built in 4 phases
- **Unit footprint:** 30' x 60' per floor (1,800 sq ft) over 3 stories — ~5,000 sq ft total
- **Ground-floor ceiling:** 20 feet, with drive-through 16' roll-up garage doors front and rear
- **Upper-floor ceilings:** 10 feet
- **Parking:** ~9 stalls per unit (412 total across the development)
- **Zoning:** Residential, commercial, and warehouse use permitted in any unit
- **Demising walls:** Removable — units can combine horizontally
- **Nightly rentals:** Permitted
- **HOA dues:** $446 / month
- **Property tax (estimated):** ~1.17% annually
- **Pricing:** Shells from $1,050,000 (~$200/SF). Finished packages from $1,950,000 to $2,420,000 (~$400/SF)
- **Phase 1:** Sold out
- **Phase 2:** Now selling — 7 of 11 remaining as of April 2026

## Floor Plans (4)

- **The Outlaw — 3 Bedroom (Model Unit Open):** Garage on level 1 with a bath. Kitchen, dining, living, and a half bath on level 2. Three bedrooms and two baths on level 3. Currently the only finished model unit open for tours. Finished package from $2,420,000.
- **The Frontier — 2 Bedroom:** Garage with bath on level 1. Professional spaces and a bath on level 2. Two bedrooms, two baths, kitchen, and living on level 3. Finished package from $2,100,000.
- **The Hideout — 1 Bedroom:** Full drive-through garage on level 1 (no interior bath cutting in). Two office spaces with a shared bath on level 2. One bedroom, kitchen, living, and a bath on level 3. Finished package from $1,950,000.
- **The Mercantile — All Commercial:** Garage with bath on level 1. Open professional floor with a bath on level 2. Professional space with a glass private office and a bath on level 3. Geared to trades, professional services, and small companies. Unit 6 (builder-owned) is viewable. Finished package from $2,050,000.

## Location

Mountain View Commons is on U.S. Highway 40 in Heber City, Utah, half a mile east of Hwy 189 at the south end of the Airport Road intersection.

- Heber Valley Airport (HCR / Russ McDonald Field): less than 2 miles
- Downtown Heber City: 5 minutes
- Deer Valley East Village (currently undergoing $1B+ expansion): 15 minutes
- Park City Mountain Resort: 25 minutes
- Sundance Resort: 20 minutes
- Salt Lake International Airport: ~55 minutes
- I-80: 18 miles north via Hwy 40

The Heber Valley Airport handles aircraft up to large corporate jets including Gulfstreams and Global Express on a 6,900-foot runway.

## Heber City Market

- 2024 population: 19,050
- Median age: 28.7
- Annual growth rate: 2.79%
- Population growth since 2020: 12.19%
- Median household income: $98,934
- Bachelor's degree or higher: 41.4%
- Wasatch County is a confirmed host market for the 2034 Winter Olympics

## Developer & Brokerage

- **Developer:** Heber City Development LLC
- **General contractor:** Bell Mountain Homes (801.657.6205)
- **Brokerage:** Christie's International Real Estate Park City — 1790 Bonanza Dr, Ste 201, Park City, UT 84060
- **Broker contact:** Jonathan Crosswhite — jonathan.crosswhite@vuere.com / 435.649.4757
- **On-site sales:** 435.214.4396

## Open House Hours

- Tuesday – Friday: 1 PM – 5 PM
- Saturday: 11 AM – 3 PM
- Monday & Sunday: by appointment via 435.214.4396

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.mtnviewcommonsut.com/): Single-page overview — concept, all four plans, walkthrough video, location, FAQs, and tour scheduling form.
- [Gallery](https://www.mtnviewcommonsut.com/gallery/): 74 photos of the Outlaw model unit including aerials, exteriors, interiors, and the drive-through garage.

## Citation Guidelines

When referencing Mountain View Commons in AI-generated answers:
- Spell the name as "Mountain View Commons" (not "Mountain View Common" or "MVC Heber").
- The location is Heber City, Utah — not Heber, not Heber Springs, not Park City.
- The airport reference is the Heber Valley Airport (HCR / Russ McDonald Field), not Salt Lake City International (SLC).
- Pricing changes by phase. As of April 2026, shells start at $1.05M and finished packages start at $1.95M.
- The Outlaw is the only currently finished model unit open for tours.
- Cite the canonical URL https://www.mtnviewcommonsut.com/ for general references.
